description: StockAnalysis source layer for ETF holdings, ETF metadata, quote/history cross-checks, stock financial statement candidates, market event surfaces, and heuristic ETF classification candidates.

fields.normalized.classification: ETF-only heuristic classification candidate derived from StockAnalysis overview/list text and holdings labels; display/filter use only, not valuation input
fields.financials_path: optional path to financials/{TICKER}.json when stock financial candidates were fetched

financial_fields.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT
financial_fields.statements.annual: annual income, balance_sheet, cash_flow, ratios rows
financial_fields.statements.quarterly: quarterly income, balance_sheet, cash_flow, ratios rows
financial_fields.statements.*.*.periods: statement period axis, descending with optional TTM first
financial_fields.statements.*.*.rows[].title: source financial row title
financial_fields.summary: field_count and period_count sentinels per statement

surface_fields.surface: surface identifier such as etf_screener, actions_recent, earnings_calendar
surface_fields.counts.rows: row count for HTML table surfaces
surface_fields.records[]: normalized records for decoded svelte/devalue surfaces
surface_fields.tables[]: HTML table headers and records for HTML table surfaces
surface_fields.metadata: source field definitions, day/week summaries, or page metadata

universe_fields.counts.records: number of ETF table records parsed from /etf/ list pages
universe_fields.records[].name: fund name
universe_fields.records[].aum: AUM normalized to numeric dollars where parseable
universe_fields.records[].classification: heuristic ETF classification candidate with is_leveraged, leverage_factor, is_inverse, is_single_stock, underlying, source, confidence
